headline: Jim Cramer on Carrier Global: “This Quarter May Be the Beginning of a Multi-Year Move”
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. Cramer highlighted the market’s reaction after the company reported, as he said: Eaton, based in Ohio, makes the transformers needed to put that electricity into the data center. headline: CARR Q1 Deep Dive: Data Center Momentum and Pricing Actions Offset Margin Pressure
summary: Heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration company Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 2.4% year on year to $5.34 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $22 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.57 per share was 12.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
